mapper.sql: sar.id, sar.assessment_grade, sar.assessment_right, sar.wage_right, sar.work_flag, sar.create_time, sar.create_by, sar.update_time, sar.update_by, sar.add_reason, sar.confirm_person

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.assessment_grade as ${tAlias}_assessment_grade, ${tAlias}.assessment_right as ${tAlias}_assessment_right, ${tAlias}.wage_right as ${tAlias}_wage_right, ${tAlias}.work_flag as ${tAlias}_work_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.add_reason as ${tAlias}_add_reason,${tAlias}.confirm_person as ${tAlias}_confirm_person
mapper.insert: insert into swm_appraisal_rules (assessment_grade, assessment_right, wage_right, work_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, add_reason, confirm_person) values (#{assessmentGrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessmentRight,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wageRight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{addReason, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{confirmPerson, jdbcType = VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update swm_appraisal_rules set work_flag = #{workFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, add_reason = #{addReason, jdbcType =VARCHAR}, confirm_person = #{confirmPerson, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update swm_appraisal_rules set assessment_grade = #{assessmentGrade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assessment_right = #{assessmentRight,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wage_right = #{wageRight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, work_flag = #{workFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, add_reason = #{addReason, jdbcType =VARCHAR}, confirm_person = #{confirmPerson, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_appraisal_rules where assessment_grade = #{assessmentGrade, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and work_flag = 1
